positive: A stylized, symmetrical crest featuring an abstract depiction of a soaring mountain peak merging into a crescent moon and a forest silhouette. The style should be neo-traditional tattoo art meets minimalist linework. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt gold, and slate gray. The composition must be highly detailed but clean, designed as a centered, circular emblem with defined negative space suitable for high-contrast fabric printing. Emphasize clean, solid black linework against the color fields, giving it a bold, graphic, yet ethereal feel. Focus on strong outlines and clear silhouettes.
negative: blur, realistic photo, photorealism, logo, text, watermark, signature, copyright, messy lines, gradients, fuzzy, low contrast, blurry background, extra limbs, bad anatomy
